[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111001 5
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11000100 3
5 11000010 3
6 01111000 4
7 00011110 4
